title: Fab 40: Veteran Neuer stops Madrid on MVP night
summary: Manuel Neuer delivered a standout performance with nine saves as Bayern Munich defeated Real Madrid 2-1 in their Champions League quarterfinal first leg. Manager Vincent Kompany praised the veteran goalkeeper's consistent excellence throughout the match.
content: Vincent Kompany said he's "impressed every day" by Manuel Neuer after the veteran goalkeeper made nine saves in Bayern Munich's 2-1 Champions League win over Real Madrid on Tuesday.

zh.title: 传奇四十：老将诺伊尔在MVP之夜力阻马德里
zh.summary: 曼努埃尔·诺伊尔在欧冠四分之一决赛首回合中表现出色，献出9次精妙扑救，帮助拜仁慕尼黑2-1击败皇家马德里。经理文森特·孔帕尼赞扬了这位老将门神整场比赛中的一贯卓越表现。

title: Havertz says Arsenal are ready to 'win big titles'
summary: Kai Havertz scored a dramatic stoppage-time goal to give Arsenal a 1-0 victory over Sporting Lisbon in the Champions League quarterfinal first leg. The win positions Arsenal well for the second leg and bolsters their title ambitions.
content: Kai Havertz scored in stoppage time to give Arsenal a 1-0 win in the first leg of its Champions League quarterfinal against Sporting Lisbon on Tuesday.

zh.title: 哈弗茨表示阿森纳已准备好赢得大赛冠军
zh.summary: 凯·哈弗茨在欧冠四分之一决赛首回合中以戏剧性的伤停补时进球为阿森纳1-0击败里斯本竞技。这场胜利为阿森纳的次回合奠定了基础，增强了他们的争冠雄心。

title: Simeone catches Griezmann off guard with tribute
summary: Atlético Madrid manager Diego Simeone paid tribute to Antoine Griezmann as the veteran forward prepares to leave for MLS side Orlando City. The gesture highlights Griezmann's significant impact during his tenure with the Spanish club.
content: Atlético Madrid manager Diego Simeone expressed his gratitude to Antoine Griezmann as the forward nears his move to Orlando City.

zh.title: 西蒙尼用致敬让格里兹曼措手不及
zh.summary: 马德里竞技主帅迪亚哥·西蒙尼向即将加盟美职联奥兰多城的资深前锋安托万·格里兹曼致敬。这一举动凸显了格里兹曼在该西班牙俱乐部期间的重大影响力。

title: Wirtz says VVD wrong about Liverpool giving up
summary: Florian Wirtz disagreed with Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk's assertion that the team gave up during Saturday's 4-0 FA Cup loss to Manchester City. The dispute highlights differing perspectives on the performance and Liverpool's approach in the match.
content: Florian Wirtz has rejected claims by Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk that the team gave up during Saturday's 4-0 FA Cup defeat against Manchester City.

zh.title: 维尔茨称范迪克关于利物浦放弃的说法是错误的
zh.summary: 弗洛里安·维尔茨不同意利物浦队长维吉尔·范迪克的观点，该观点声称球队在周六对阵曼城的足总杯比赛中以0-4落败时放弃了比赛。这一分歧突出了对比赛表现和利物浦战术的不同看法。

title: Madrid grateful as Mbappé keeps Bayern tie 'alive'
summary: Real Madrid suffered a 2-1 Champions League quarterfinal first-leg loss to Bayern Munich, but manager Álvaro Arbeloa expressed confidence their tie remains competitive after Kylian Mbappé's second-half goal. Madrid will have an opportunity to mount a comeback in the second leg.
content: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said Real Madrid's chances of progressing in the Champions League are "still alive" after Kylian Mbappé's second-half goal saw Madrid beaten 2-1 by Bayern Munich in their quarterfinal first leg.

zh.title: 皇马感激姆巴佩保持拜仁对阵的希望
zh.summary: 皇家马德里在欧冠四分之一决赛首回合中以1-2负于拜仁慕尼黑，但主教练阿尔瓦罗·阿贝罗亚在基利安·姆巴佩下半场进球后表示相信他们的对阵仍然充满竞争力。皇马将有机会在第二回合实现翻盘。

title: Southampton drop Wrexham from top 6 in rout
summary: Southampton cruised to a dominant 5-1 victory over Wrexham in the Championship, moving into the playoff places. The FA Cup semifinalists continued their strong form in their bid to secure promotion.
content: FA Cup semifinalists Southampton continued their Championship charge as they thrashed Wrexham 5-1 at Stok Cae Ras to replace the Welsh side in the playoff places.

zh.title: 南安普敦大胜将雷克瑟姆击出前6
zh.summary: 南安普敦在冠军杯中以5-1的绝对优势大胜雷克瑟姆，进入附加赛区。这支足总杯半决赛队伍继续保持强劲势头，争取晋级。

title: Wrexham keeper switches from England to Nigeria
summary: Wrexham goalkeeper Arthur Okonkwo received FIFA approval to switch his international allegiance from England to Nigeria ahead of the World Cup. The move opens the opportunity for Okonkwo to represent a different nation at the international level.
content: Wrexham goalkeeper Arthur Okonkwo has had his request to switch international allegiance from England to Nigeria approved by FIFA ahead of the World Cup.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆门神从英格兰转投尼日利亚
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆门神阿瑟·奥孔夸获得国际足联批准，在世界杯前将国际足球代表身份从英格兰转投尼日利亚。这一举动为奥孔夸提供了代表另一个国家参加国际赛事的机会。

title: If Arsenal are going to win a title, it'll be within fine margins
summary: Arsenal's stoppage-time victory against Sporting CP exemplifies their ability to win matches through narrow margins this season. The pattern suggests the club's title hopes may depend on their capacity to secure tight results under pressure.
content: Arsenal won it late against Sporting CP in their UCL match, continuing a pattern for the Gunners.

zh.title: 阿森纳如果要赢得冠军，必将在细微之处见真章
zh.summary: 阿森纳在客场对阵葡萄牙体育队的补时胜利充分展现了他们本赛季通过微弱优势赢得比赛的能力。这种模式表明俱乐部的冠军梦想可能取决于他们在压力下确保紧凑结果的能力。
